(type -p wget >/dev/null || (sudo apt update && sudo apt-get install wget -y)) 	&& sudo mkdir -p -m 755 /etc/apt/keyrings         && out=$(mktemp) && wget -nv -O$out https://cli.github.com/packages/githubcli-archive-keyring.gpg         && cat $out | sudo tee /etc/apt/keyrings/githubcli-archive-keyring.gpg > /dev/null 	&& sudo chmod go+r /etc/apt/keyrings/githubcli-archive-keyring.gpg 	&& echo "deb [arch=$(dpkg --print-architecture) signed-by=/etc/apt/keyrings/githubcli-archive-keyring.gpg] https://cli.github.com/packages stable main" | sudo tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/github-cli.list > /dev/null 	&& sudo apt update 	&& sudo apt install gh -y

sudo curl -fsSL https://download.docker.com/linux/ubuntu/gpg -o /etc/apt/keyrings/docker.asc
sudo chmod a+r /etc/apt/keyrings/docker.asc
echo   "deb [arch=$(dpkg --print-architecture) signed-by=/etc/apt/keyrings/docker.asc] https://download.docker.com/linux/ubuntu \
  $(. /etc/os-release && echo "${UBUNTU_CODENAME:-$VERSION_CODENAME}") stable" |   sudo tee /etc/apt/sources.list.d/docker.list > /dev/null

if [ "$XDG_SESSION_TYPE" == "wayland" ] && [ "$(echo $XDG_CURRENT_DESKTOP | grep -i GNOME)" ]; then     echo "Applying Wayland settings for GNOME...";     gsettings set org.gnome.mutter.wayland xwayland-allow-grabs true
     gsettings set org.gnome.mutter.wayland xwayland-grab-access-rules "['Remmina', 'VirtualBox Machine', 'Virtual Machine Manager' , 'parsecd']"; else     echo "Skipping Wayland specific settings (not on GNOME Wayland)."; fi

mkdir -p .github/workflows          assets/fonts          assets/icons/userProfile          assets/icons/webApps          assets/wallpaper/dark          assets/wallpaper/light          config/apps          config/cli          config/code          config/git          config/hybrid          config/security          config/shell          dotfiles/bash/aliases          dotfiles/bash/functions          dotfiles/bash/kp          scripts/hooks          scripts/modules          scripts/packages          scripts/tests          scripts/os/linux/appsLists          scripts/os/linux/bin          scripts/os/linux/build          scripts/os/macos          scripts/os/windows/bin/install          scripts/os/windows/bin/portable          scripts/os/windows/build          secrets/ssh          docs/guides          docs/screenshots          docs/wiki
# Create placeholder files (optional, but good practice)
touch .github/workflows/.gitkeep       assets/fonts/.gitkeep       assets/icons/userProfile/.gitkeep       assets/icons/webApps/.gitkeep       assets/wallpaper/dark/.gitkeep       assets/wallpaper/light/.gitkeep       config/apps/.gitkeep       config/cli/.gitkeep       config/code/.gitkeep       config/git/.gitkeep       config/hybrid/.gitkeep       config/security/.gitkeep       config/shell/.gitkeep       dotfiles/bash/aliases/.gitkeep       dotfiles/bash/functions/.gitkeep       dotfiles/bash/kp/.gitkeep       scripts/hooks/.gitkeep       scripts/modules/.gitkeep       scripts/packages/.gitkeep       scripts/tests/.gitkeep       scripts/os/linux/appsLists/.gitkeep       scripts/os/linux/bin/.gitkeep       scripts/os/linux/build/.gitkeep       scripts/os/macos/.gitkeep       scripts/os/windows/bin/install/.gitkeep       scripts/os/windows/bin/portable/.gitkeep       scripts/os/windows/build/.gitkeep       secrets/ssh/.gitkeep       docs/guides/.gitkeep       docs/screenshots/.gitkeep       docs/wiki/.gitkeep       .env.example       .gitignore       .stow-local-ignore       README.md
# Add essential ignores to .gitignore
echo "# Secrets (Templates/Placeholders ONLY - REAL secrets should NOT be committed)" > .gitignore
echo "secrets/" >> .gitignore
echo "" >> .gitignore
echo "# Environment variables" >> .gitignore
echo ".env" >> .gitignore
echo "" >> .gitignore
echo "# Cache and local data (generally not version controlled)" >> .gitignore
echo "*.cache/" >> .gitignore
echo ".cache/" >> .gitignore
echo ".local/" >> .gitignore
echo "" >> .gitignore
echo "# Build artifacts" >> .gitignore
echo "build/" >> .gitignore
echo "build*/" >> .gitignore
echo "" >> .gitignore
echo "# OS-specific files" >> .gitignore
echo ".DS_Store" >> .gitignore
echo "Thumbs.db" >> .gitignore
# Initialize Git repository if it's a new project
